channel.title: Salesforce on xuanjin
channel.description: Recent content in Salesforce on xuanjin

item.title: Salesforce's Agentforce: Revolutionizing Business with Autonomous AI Agents
item.description: Salesforce’s Agentforce: Revolutionizing Business with Autonomous AI Agents Link to heading Salesforce, a leader in customer relationship management (CRM) software, has recently launched Agentforce, a groundbreaking platform designed to deploy autonomous AI agents across various business functions. This article delves into the features, benefits, and potential drawbacks of Agentforce, providing a comprehensive overview of this innovative product. What is Agentforce? Link to heading Agentforce is an advanced AI platform that enables businesses to create and manage autonomous agents capable of performing a wide range of tasks.
